text: EBITDA for Q4 2026 stood at $51,283,000,000, translating to an EBITDA margin of 75.28% [0bb38bcc-0b49-4e55-a1c5-eb790c883a09][be596dad-ea77-43d3-ac22-0b5f55d06a2e]. Free cash flow margin reached 51.23% for the quarter, indicating strong cash conversion quality [4919779e-20bb-413b-9fe6-e611a6e0baea]. This high FCF margin suggests the company generates substantial cash relative to revenue, supporting capital allocation flexibility for shareholders and strategic investments.

issues.explanation: The claimed EBITDA margin (75.28%) contradicts the Previously Verified Facts which state Gross Margin was 75.00% and Operating Margin was 65.02% for Q4 2026. Mathematically, EBITDA Margin cannot exceed Gross Margin (as EBITDA = Gross Profit - Non-D&A Operating Expenses). Additionally, the implied Depreciation & Amortization (10.26% of revenue, derived from EBITDA - Operating Margin) exceeds the Total Operating Expenses (9.98% of revenue, derived from Gross Margin - Operating Margin), which is impossible as D&A is a component of Operating Expenses.
issues.recommended_fix: Reconcile the EBITDA margin figure with the verified Gross and Operating margins. Ensure EBITDA Margin is lower than Gross Margin and that implied D&A does not exceed Total Operating Expenses. Verify the source data for EBITDA or the verified margins for accuracy.
